title: Miss cert-dir and creds option for `buildah bud`
body: It looks that if the command is operating with a registry, it have options `authfile`, `cert-dir`, `creds` and `tls-verify`. So I think `cert-dir` and `creds` options need to add to `buildah bud` as well.

comments.body:
Hi @gouyang I am not sure what are the differences among these options so I am going to ping @TomSweeneyRedHat @nalind

Thanks.
@gouyang fixed with #419.  Please reopen if you find otherwise and thanks for the problem report.
